problem id: 3c58cf62
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10100011 -> 01001100
  10000011 -> 00001110
  11001000 -> 10011100
  11100001 -> 11001100
  01110110 -> 11101011
  10011110 -> 00110101
  11111110 -> 11110011
  10010000 -> 00101001

query: 01111100
predicted answer: 11111111
